title: Is Nocturnal Kent dead? Looksmaxxing streamer sparks concern after alleged brain aneurysm rumors
summary_full: Rumors about looksmaxxing streamer Nocturnal Kent's alleged death spread rapidly across social media after an image claiming to show him in an ICU bed surfaced online. Posts also alleged he suffered a brain aneurysm. However, no official statement from his family, representatives, or authorities has confirmed the reports. Until verified information is released, the claims remain unconfirmed, and fans have been urged to avoid sharing speculation as fact.
